\"(ssr)/./node_modules/next-intl/dist/esm/development/react-client/index.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/i18n-db */ \"(ssr)/./lib/i18n-db.ts\");\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nconst BIOME_MAP = {\n    mountain: 'Montanya',\n    coast: 'Mar',\n    city: 'City',\n    interior: 'Interior',\n    bloom: 'Blossom'\n};\nconst typeToIconName = {\n    'RELIGIOS': 'Esglesia',\n    'CIVIL': 'Casa',\n    'DEFENSIU': 'Castell',\n    'LLEGENDA': 'Castell',\n    'AIGUA': 'Aigua',\n    'MIRADOR': 'Vistes',\n    'NATURA': 'Arbre',\n    'GUERRA_CIVIL': 'Civil_war',\n    'PERSONA_ILLUSTRE': 'Personatje'\n};\nfunction getPoiIconSrc(poi, parentRoute, globalBiome) {\n    const category = globalBiome || (poi.category || parentRoute?.category || 'mountain').toLowerCase();\n    const biome = BIOME_MAP[category] || BIOME_MAP['mountain'];\n    if (poi.icon) {\n        const baseName = poi.icon.split('.')[0];\n        return `/icons/${biome}/${baseName}.webp`;\n    }\n    const type = (poi.type || '').toUpperCase();\n    const mappedName = typeToIconName[type] || 'punt_interest';\n    const availableFiles = _lib_icons_mapping_json__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_12__[biome] || [];\n    const finalIcon = availableFiles.find((f)=>f.toLowerCase().startsWith(mappedName.toLowerCase())) || 'punt_interest.webp';\n    return `/icons/${biome}/${finalIcon}`;\n}\n\n\nfunction LegendDetailScreen({ legend, onNavigate, brand, userLocation, currentUser, onUserUpdate }) {\n    const locale = (0,next_intl__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_14__.useLocale)();\n    const t = (0,next_intl__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_15__.useTranslations)('detail');\n    const tCommon = (0,next_intl__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_15__.useTranslations)('common');\n    // Extract coordinates safely\n    const lat = legend?.latitude ?? legend?.coordinates?.lat ?? 0;\n    const lng = legend?.longitude ?? legend?.coordinates?.lng ?? 0;\n    // Fallback for missing legend data with localization\n    const safeLegend = {\n        ...legend,\n        title: (0,_lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.getLocalizedContent)(legend, 'title', locale) || t('notFound'),\n        description: (0,_lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.getLocalizedContent)(legend, 'description', locale) || \"\",\n        image: legend?.image || legend?.image_url || \"\",\n        location: (0,_lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.getLocalizedContent)(legend, 'location', locale) || t('unknown'),\n        categoryLabel: (0,_lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.getLocalizedContent)(legend, 'categoryLabel', locale) || t('unknown'),\n        coordinates: {\n            lat,\n            lng\n        },\n        videoUrls: legend?.videoUrls || (legend?.video_url ? [\n            legend.video_url\n        ] : []),\n        audioUrl: legend?.audioUrl || legend?.audio || legend?.audio_url,\n        manualQuiz: legend?.manualQuiz,\n        userUnlocks: legend?.userUnlocks || [],\n        routeName: (0,_lib_i18n_db__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.getLocalizedContent)(legend, 'route_name', locale) || legend?.routeName\n    };\n    const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [isFavorite, setIsFavorite] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [userRating, setUserRating] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(0);\n    const [showFinalQuiz, setShowFinalQuiz] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const audioRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    const network = (0,_hooks_useNetworkStatus__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_8__.useNetworkStatus)();\n    // Parallax effect for hero\n    const { scrollY } = (0,motion_react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_16__.useScroll)();\n    const y = (0,motion_react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_17__.useTransform)(scrollY, [\n        0,\n        500\n    ], [\n        0,\n        150\n    ]);\n    const opacity = (0,motion_react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_17__.useTransform)(scrollY, [\n        0,\n        300\n    ], [\n        1,\n        0\n    ]);\n    // Parse videoMetadata for low-res URLs\n    const videoMetadata = safeLegend.videoMetadata || {};\n    const videoVariants = videoMetadata.variants || [];\n    const distanceStr = userLocation && (lat !== 0 || lng !== 0) ? (0,_lib_location__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.calculateDistance)(userLocation.latitude, userLocation.longitude, lat, lng) : null;\n    // calculateDistance returns a string like \"1.2 km\" or \"300 m\", we need numeric meters for comparison\n    const getNumericDistance = (distStr)=>{\n        if (!distStr) return null;\n        if (distStr.includes('km')) return parseFloat(distStr) * 1000;\n        return parseFloat(distStr);\n    };\n    const distanceMeters = getNumericDistance(distanceStr);\n    const UNLOCK_DISTANCE = 30; // metres\n    // Convert Supabase URLs to go through local proxy (fixes CORS in dev)\n    function proxifyUrl(url) {\n        if (!url) return '';\n        if (url.includes('supabase.co/storage/')) {\n            return `/api/img-proxy?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`;\n        }\n        return url;\n    }\n    const isRoute = !!(safeLegend.pois && safeLegend.pois.length > 0);\n    const isAlreadyVisited = !!(currentUser?.id && safeLegend.userUnlocks?.some((u)=>(u.userId || u.user_id) === currentUser.id));\n    // Si t├® routeId, ├®s un POI dins d'una ruta. Si no el t├® per├▓ t├® pois, ├®s el contenidor (overview) de la ruta.\n    const isRouteContainer = isRoute && !safeLegend.routeId && !safeLegend.poiId;\n    // Master Admin bypass: Can see everything if role is admin or superadmin master name\n    const isMasterAdmin = currentUser?.role === 'admin' || currentUser?.username === 'mistic_master' || currentUser?.email === 'mistic_master';\n    // Normalitzem l'URL de l'├áudio (pot venir com 'audioUrl', 'audio' o 'audio_url' depenent de l'origen)\n    const effectiveAudioUrl = safeLegend.audioUrl || safeLegend.audio || safeLegend.audio_url;\n    // A POI is unlocked if it's a route container, OR it was already visited, OR user is admin, OR user is close enough\n    const isUnlocked = isRouteContainer || isAlreadyVisited || isMasterAdmin || distanceMeters !== null && distanceMeters <= UNLOCK_DISTANCE;\n    const allPoisVisited = isRoute && safeLegend.pois?.length > 0 && safeLegend.pois.every((poi)=>isMasterAdmin || poi.userUnlocks?.some((u)=>u.userId === currentUser?.id));\n    const finalQuizPassed = safeLegend.userRouteProgress?.some((urp)=>urp.userId === currentUser?.id && urp.finalQuizPassed);\n    // Parse POIs to calculate numeric raw distances for sorting\n    const poisWithDistances = (safeLegend.pois || []).map((poi)=>{\n        const lat = typeof poi.latitude === 'number' ? poi.latitude : 0;\n        const lng = typeof poi.longitude === 'number' ? poi.longitude : 0;\n        // Dist├áncia raw num├¿rica per ordenar (0 si no tenim ubicaci├│)\n        const rawDist = userLocation && (lat !== 0 || lng !== 0) ? (0,_lib_location__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.calculateDistanceRaw)(userLocation.latitude, userLocation.longitude, lat, lng) : Infinity;\n        // Dist├áncia formatada per l'etiqueta (\"1.2 km\")\n        const formattedDist = userLocation && (lat !== 0 || lng !== 0) ? (0,_lib_location__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.calculateDistance)(userLocation.latitude, userLocation.longitude, lat, lng) : null;\n        return {\n            ...poi,\n            rawDist,\n            formattedDist\n        };\n    });\n    // Ordre: els m├®s propers amunt\n    const sortedPois = [\n        ...poisWithDistances\n    ].sort((a, b)=>a.rawDist - b.rawDist);\n    // Record visit when unlocked\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"LegendDetailScreen.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            if (isUnlocked && currentUser?.id && safeLegend.id) {\n                // Fire and forget\n                (0,_lib_actions__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_7__.recordVisit)(currentUser.id, safeLegend.id).then({\n                    \"LegendDetailScreen.useEffect\": (res)=>{\n                        if (res.success && res.user && onUserUpdate) {\n                            onUserUpdate(res.user);\n                        }\n                    }\n                }[\"LegendDetailScreen.useEffect\"]);\n            }\n        }\n    }[\"LegendDetailScreen.useEffect\"], [\n        isUnlocked,\n        currentUser,\n        safeLegend.id\n    ]);\n    const handlePlayAudio = ()=>{\n        if (audioRef.current) {\n            if (isPlaying) {\n                audioRef.current.pause();\n            } else {\n                audioRef.current.play();\n            }\n            setIsPlaying(!isPlaying);\n        }\n    };\n    const handleRating = (rating)=>{\n        setUserRating(rating);\n    };\n    const handleShare = async ()=>{\n        const shareData = {\n            title: safeLegend.title,\n            text: t('shareText', {\n                name: safeLegend.title\n            }),\n            url: window.location.href\n        };\n        if (navigator.share) {\n            try {\n                await navigator.share(shareData);\n            } catch (err) {\n                console.error(\"Error en compartir:\", err);\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Fallback: Copy to clipboard\n            try {\n                await navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href);\n
